description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a brown, textured terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The plant itself has a woody, branching trunk with several offshoots, each adorned with clusters of pink, five-petaled blossoms resembling cherry or plum blossoms. A few petals have fallen onto the soil and around the base of the pot, adding a naturalistic touch. The branches are somewhat angular and sparse, giving the plant an ornamental, bonsai-like appearance. The pot is simple and unadorned, with a slightly flared rim and a rough, matte finish. The overall look is decorative and well-suited for urban environments such as patios, sidewalks, or indoor communal spaces.
description: A small, decorative potted plant with pink blossoms and a brown terracotta pot, featuring fallen petals around its base. The plant has a woody trunk and sparse, angular branches, giving it a bonsai-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main trunk, several pink blossoms, and fallen petals both inside and outside the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pot's circular rim and a denser cluster of blossoms on the right, with petals scattered on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back branches and more visible fallen petals to the left of the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the trunk's verticality and a single petal on the ground in front.
